pharma.title: Takeda Biopharmaceuticals gets DCGI nod for dengue vaccine QDENGA

pharma.title: C-sections in Karnataka rise; private sector drives spike: National Family Health Survey
pharma.summary: The surge is driven largely by private healthcare sector, where 63% of births are conducted via C-section. In contrast, public health facilities report a considerably lower rate of 34%, highlighting a divide in childbirth practices between the two sectors.

pharma.title: Study by doctors find new tool to detect health risks in premature newborns
pharma.summary: The study, conducted on 181 premature babies at JK Lone Hospital in Jaipur, has highlighted the usefulness of the CRIB-II (Clinical Risk Index for Babies-II) score to assess the condition of newborns soon after admission.
